text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Fan Fest has finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is going to compete in a true or false
quiz, and she seems to be full of enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I need to do well—for the people who always
support me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want everybody to have a good time today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue is packed with her new fans from the
city.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She treasures her fans dearly, so I'm sure she'll put
in just as much effort as she would into a race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Quizzes aren't exactly my forte, but I'll do my
best!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on you to cheer for me!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text: Are you ready to begin, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ready when you are!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Oho, that's what we like to see! Okay then, one
quick question before we get started.

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, I know you love to eat, but how do you
feel about broccoli?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I love it!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
What a reassuringly confident response! Now
then, on to the main question!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
The part of the broccoli that we usually consume
is called a floret. True or false?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A floret...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Picture some broccoli in your mind!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Broccoli...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay, I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Here's my answer!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has answered with confidence! Is her
response correct, however?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I got mud in my mouth...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap decisively chooses "false"—which,
unfortunately, is incorrect, and she ends up
drenched in mud.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm fine. But... I don't get why I got it
wrong...
choice_data_list: Because the parts we eat are called florets.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That's weird. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't everyone just eat the whole
thing—leaves, stem, and all?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Oguri Cap continues to get question
after question wrong, the sight of her getting
plastered in mud is still entertaining for the
spectators—ultimately contributing to the Fan
Fest's success.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes, I got it right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap decisively chooses "true," and returns
with a big smile on her face, having got the
answer right.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I remember Take telling me about broccoli
when I was little.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: She told me that most people only eat the florets.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, I used to eat the whole thing,
so it seemed strange to me that people would
only eat the parts they like... But I'm glad that
fact stuck with me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm getting the hang of this. If the rest of
the questions are about food, there's no way I'll
lose!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Great job, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Whether it's a quiz or a race... I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by the cheers of her supporters,
Oguri Cap miraculously manages to get all the
answers right, and the Fan Fest is a fantastic
success!
